hero.subtitle: How to run, configure, and operate the NestJS template with Docker Compose or a native setup.

install.title: Installation and Configuration
install.description: Docker Compose, environment variables, connection pools, Kafka KRaft, Graylog, MailHog, and native Ubuntu setup.

users.title: Users module
users.description: Administrative CRUD over REST and GraphQL, Role enum, and persistence rules.

email.title: Email module
email.description: SMTP/Mailer, Auth confirmation and reset flows, and authenticated POST /email/send.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp module
whatsapp.description: Evolution API, phone number sent as-is, and authenticated POST /whatsapp/send.

websocket.title: WebSocket
websocket.description: Socket.IO gateway, type-based message handlers, and how to create a feature module.
